channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Box dumped, 19th April
item.description:
Outside Pullens motor factor please take it away? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lynton Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish in bushes, 19th April
item.description:
Dumped in the carpark in front of Lewes House

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15-28, Tooley Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily mass feeding of pigeons outside Symington House, 19th April
item.description:
Daily mass feeding of pigeons outside Symington House has further increased pigeon numbers leaving lots of pigeon waste on the public path and causing pigeons to intrude on surrounding balconies Please put up a sign stating do not feed the birds so that feeding rice to the pigeons every day is stopped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Deverell Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily mass feeding of pigeons, 19th April
item.description:
Daily mass feeding of pigeons has destroyed planting and produced excessive flocks of pigeons and waste on the Dickens Filed seating area that borders Harper Road Please put up a sign stating do not feed the birds so that feeding rice to the pigeons every day is stopped
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Falmouth Road, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bell Bollard needs replacing, 19th April
item.description:
The Bell Bollard has been knocked over on the corner of Hydethorpe and Cavendish Road and needs rectifying. This is in the London Borough of Lambeth

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hydethorpe Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bags fly tipping, 19th April
item.description:
Rubbish bags left near the park. I believe to be fly tipping as been there a while.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Salters Hill, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The cycle lane is full of gravel, potholes and debris, 19th April
item.description:
For many months the cycle lane has been covered in cracks and potholes. There is no way to avoid them as you cannot exit from the cycle lane. There is a lot of gravel/debris which is a skidding risk.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bexley Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned mattress, 19th April
item.description:
Abandoned mattress on Dunn street next to shutters

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dunn Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Window frame, 19th April
item.description:
Broken window frame left on Carver Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 38, Carver Road, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping cnr Brixton Road and Crewdson Road, 18th April
item.description:
Flytipping cnr Brixton Road and Crewdson Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 62a, Brixton Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned trailer, 18th April
item.description:
Since moving to this estate a few years ago we have never seen this trailer move. Does it serve a purpose?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pytchley Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black abandoned bike frame, 18th April
item.description:
No wheel, upside down and blocking the stand

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bolton Crescent, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: De, 18th April
item.description:
Dead cat found outside no. 36C Hamlet Road at c 11pm tonight, Saturday April 18th. No movement or collar seen.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36b, Hamlet Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike frame, 18th April
item.description:
Btwin frame missing seat, all rusty been there for years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bolton Crescent, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree has been cut but trunk sticking out, 18th April
item.description:
Tree was cut in Sept 2025 as it had died. The trunk has been left and very long and needs to be cut as looks like it's going to fall into the road.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can road and gutter be swept here please?, 18th April
item.description:
Build up of leaves and debris here. Can it be cleared please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamppost not working, 18th April
item.description:
Lamppost outside No11 Hollinhwoetj are not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollingworth Road, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose BT manhole cover in pavement, 18th April
item.description:
Please secure this manhole cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, South Street, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can cracked road surface on Forde Ave be checked?, 18th April
item.description:
Road surface is cracked. Please inspect

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Forde Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped items, 18th April
item.description:
A mattress and a range of other items dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eardley Road, Lessness Heath, Greater London
